title: hashcat
html:
hashcat

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo -n DATA | tee /path/to/wordlist | md5sum | awk '{print $1}' >/path/to/hash
hashcat -m 0 --quiet --potfile-disable -o /path/to/output-file --outfile-format=2 --outfile-autohex-disable /path/to/hash /path/to/wordlist
excerpt: hashcat File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged echo -n DATA | tee /path/to/wordlist | md5sum | awk '{print $1}' >/path/to/hash hashcat -m 0 --quiet --potfile-disable -o /path/to/output-fi
